Item 1A.Risk Factors10
Item 7.Management's Discussion and Analysis30

Part I

Item 1.    Business

The Company designs, manufactures and markets consumer electronics and services worldwide.

Item 1A.    Risk Factors

Our business is subject to numerous risks including intense competition and supply chain concentration.

Item 1B.    Unresolved Staff Comments

None.

Item 2.    Properties

The Company's headquarters are located in California.

Item 3.    Legal Proceedings

The Company is subject to various legal proceedings and claims.

Part II

Item 7.    Management’s Discussion and Analysis of Financial Condition and Results of Operations

Net sales increased during fiscal 2024 driven by higher services revenue.

Item 7A.    Quantitative and Qualitative Disclosures About Market Risk

The Company is exposed to interest rate risk and foreign currency risk.

Item 8.    Financial Statements and Supplementary Data

Report of Independent Registered Public Accounting Firm and consolidated financial statements.

Item 9A.    Controls and Procedures

Management concluded that internal control over financial reporting was effective.
